items.title: U.S.–China proxy battle over Panama Canal ports set to intensify as CK Hutchison warns of legal action
items.description: The simmering dispute has become a geopolitical flashpoint between Washington and Beijing, with Panama caught in the crossfires.

items.title: Epstein files: Goldman Sachs top lawyer Kathryn Ruemmler to step down after email fallout
items.description: Kathryn Ruemmler joins a growing list of people whose professional lives have been rocked by their past associations with Jeffrey Epstein.

items.title: DHS shutdown all but certain as Democrats and Trump White House can't cut deal
items.description: The Department of Homeland Security is set to shut down early Saturday morning after the Senate did not pass a short-term funding deal.
